{{CargoClone
|name=Psychic Dragon
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=192
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Micro Incubator: Convert Blue product to Purple by + 0.3%
|gene4=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Micro Incubator: Convert Purple product to Orange by + 0.3%
|gene6=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Micro Incubator: Convert Purple product to Orange by + 0.5%
|}}
